# CWE-278 — Insecure Preserved Inherited Permissions (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-278-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"archive/tar"
	"io"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: restores archive entry mode verbatim, including 0777 bits.
func ExtractBundle(c *gin.Context, r io.Reader) {
	tr := tar.NewReader(r)
	for {
		hdr, err := tr.Next()
		if err == io.EOF {
			break
		}
		if err != nil {
			break
		}
		f, _ := os.OpenFile(hdr.Name, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY, os.FileMode(hdr.Mode))
		_, _ = io.Copy(f, tr)
		f.Close()
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"extracted": true})
}
